titleStmt.title: SII 27.70: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 70. (A.R. No. 260 of 1931-32.) KACHCHŪRU (KŌṬAKĒRI), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in the tank opposite the Pañchaliṅgēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 13 • •, Īśvara, Kārttika śu• 1, Monday corresponding to 1397 A.D., October 22. The Śaka year was 1319.

The top portion of the slab is damaged. It registers the gift of lands and money income probably to the god Mārkkaṇḍēśvara by several individuals. It refers to the residence of Kōṭeyakēri. The king is said to have been ruling from his nelevīḍu at Dōrasamudra. The name of the governor of Bārakūru-rājya is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayēṁnamaḥ . namastuṁga śirascuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē tryelōkyanagarāraṁ
bha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 13
Īśvara saṁvatsarada kārtikaśuddha 1 sōmavāradalu svastiśrī manmahārājādirāja paramēśvara
Arirāyaviṅāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrī vīrapratāpa hariharamahārā
yaru dōrasamudrada nelevīḍinalirdu duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālaneyaṁdasukha
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ Oḍḍōlagaṁ goṭṭihakāladali Ārāyara nirūpadiṁda
rasa Oḍeyaru bārukūrarājyavanu pratipālisuvakāladali kōṭeya
dina vāgi mārkkaṁḍēśvara dēvara saṁnidhiyali gōṭikāvalu
vaṇada siridāmahaṁtana magamallāmahaṁtanu voḍida
yavāgi kōṭeya kēriya haladu mallidēva
yyali koṁḍa bāḷavivara hegguṁjiya biḷagesiri
ḷiya nāḷuva bhaṁḍāriya kayyalu koṁḍabāḷu Ā bāḷu
lu Ā Ūra Oḷage nu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍabāḷa catussīmeya vi
vara koṭeyaṁṇa caṭṭa
ceṁmakka heggaḍiti bāgila gaddeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu ṁvaḷatiya
yaṁtī catussīmeya Oḷagaṇa
gaddeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
viyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yaṁtī catussīmeya
ṭṭinagade 1 kkaṁ bhūmi Aḷu
yalu battuvamoḍe 1 bāḷi
Appaṇeya vivara hoyiyoḷa heggaḍeya
ḍalagadde cittaraṭeyamēle tāra 1 ṭhāū
mēle tāraṁ . ceṁmakkaheggaḍitiya maneṭhāu bayalamēlū tāra 1
paya heggaḍeya mēlūtāra 1 keyagaddeya Uḍigetāra 1 cittaraṭeyana mēletā
raṁ . veyanagaddeya mēlūtāraṁ . maḍeyanāyakana hela gaddeyamēle hākuva
mēle tāra 1 . Ōjanabaḷiya bīriseṭṭiya bāḷamēle tā
raṁ . yoṁṇeya taṁmiseṭṭiya bāḷa mēle tāra 2 sirāṁgga seṭṭiya bāḷamēlo tāra 5
kaṁbaḍittiya bāḷa mēle tāra 1 siṁdanabaḷiya kuṁdeyana bāḷa mēle tāra 1 Ā bāḷa
hattiraṇa Ākārura bāḷa mēle tāra 1 Aṁtu haḍi vodala tāra 22 . ga haḷi Ā
rāmi nerahaḷi paḍuva tāra 19 nuḷiye Ādāya tāra62kaṭṭuṁ teṟu ceṁnalaseya
bāḷa mēle ga 3 cikkaṁṇanaṁdariya bāḷamēle ga 1 [.] koḍaṁgeya gaddeya mekke makkiya
mēle ga 1 . bedeya gaddeya mēle ga 0 . 1 caṇāra saddeya mēle ga 0 .... mēlaṁṭettiya
maneṭhāu makki mekkedeḷa daṁneya bāḷa mēle ga 1 Aṁttu kaṭṭuṁdeṟu ga 8 mattaka ḍiṁ
ṭabaḷiya tala Eṁṇeya Āḷiya jattu kohari kōṭiyaṁṇa sāvaṁtagaḷa kayiyali naḍava
heggaṁjeya Oḷage dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍakohina bāḷu kuṁṭilada dukki bayala catu
catu ssīmeya vivara narasiṁganaṁdariya kōṭi seṭṭiya bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu beṁmakarāḍiya bāḷiṁdaṁThe expressioncatu' here is redundant.
baḍagalu muṁdu deṁṇeya bāḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yiyā ra heggaḍeya boccariga
na halasiniṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷege bayalagadde ḷakkaṁ bittuva moḍe 12
Ā bayaliṁda mūḍaṇa makki bittuva mūḍe 20 Ubhayaṁ bittuva mūḍe 32 Ā bayaliṁda
ṁ keṟiya gaddeya nīrusalikeya baccalu sahatavāgi makkigekalu keṟiyatale mattaṁ yi
bāḷayi haḷe yīśānyadalu kallusuṁkadabāgila bayala gade 3 kkaṁ catussīmeya vivara ho
yiyora heggaḍeya bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yiṁtī catussīmeya Oḷagaṇa bayalu mūḍe 5
Aṁtu kuṁdilara bāḷu saḷita bittuva mūḍe 37 ya bāḷiṁgekāla gālakke teṟuvakaṭṭuṁ
deṟu muṁthāmuṁḍiyogi kuṁdila bāḷiṁge ga 1 suṁkada bāgila bayala gaddege ga 0 ... vanu
jattu koṭhārige tettu bāḷuvaru Āṁttu nānā bageya bāḷubittuva bedenāgaṁḍugadali mo
ḍerḷi I bāḷiṁge gēṇe 3 da hānedarave Akki nāgaṁḍugadalli Akki moḍe 42 nālvata yeraḍu
mattaṁ cerkkāṭiya Ūra Oḷagaṇa kuṇāra cirunoḍara moṁḍugaḷu hoṁnakkada hari Ā ciru
noḍara heṁbāḍiṁda taṁggaṭabāsegebaṁda tābadda brahmadāyadamūlada modala kācina
bāḷukaṁṇāra Oḷagaṇabāḷa catussīmeya vivaramūḍalu Aṁṇama noḍana gaḍiyiṁda
paḍuvalu teṁkalu kujubūra kallāranagaḍiyaṁda baḍagalu Aṁṇama noḍana
bāḷiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu holana Āgaḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīyoḷage Uḷaba
yalu bittuva mūḍe 10 makki mūḍe 53 makkiya Oḷage teṁgina tōṭa 1 bayalagadde O
ḷage Aṁcina mēleyidda teṁgināranu Alli Uḷamane mane ṭhāu sahitavāgi mattaṁ
yi bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu maṭhadakeṟiya nīru holakke takkanīru sadde muṭṭasada baccalu mattaṁ I
bāḷiṁda makkeya catussīme mūḍalu siriyaṁmaḍahana bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkalu siriyaṁmaḍahana beṁmaṁṇaḍahana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beṁmaṁṇa
ḍahana bāḷa gaḍiyiṁdā mūḍalu lakka hittiya bāḷagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
Digital edition of SII 27.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
